info.name: Web APIs
info.description: Admin dashboard and employee dashboard APIs. Admin routes use {{admin_token}}; employee routes use {{employee_token}}.

item.name: Auth
item.description: Admin and employee web authentication flow. Copy OTPs from Mailtrap/email into admin_otp or employee_otp.

request.description:
Purpose: Start admin login and send OTP by email.
Required role: public
Required token: none
Expected response: standard GCMS API envelope with success, message, data, and meta when present.

exec: pm.test('status code is 200 or 201', function () { pm.expect([200, 201]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
pm.test('response has success key', function () { var json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('success'); });
var json = pm.response.json();
function getPath(obj, path) { return path.split('.').reduce(function (current, key) { return current && current[key] !== undefined ? current[key] : undefined; }, obj); }

[["data.user_id","data.user.id"]].flat().some(function (path) { var value = getPath(json, path); if (value !== undefined && value !== null && value !== '') { pm.environment.set('admin_user_id', value); return true; } return false; });

request.description:
Purpose: Verify admin OTP and save admin_token.
Required role: public
Required token: none
Expected response: standard GCMS API envelope with success, message, data, and meta when present.

exec: pm.test('status code is 200 or 201', function () { pm.expect([200, 201]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
pm.test('response has success key', function () { var json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('success'); });
var json = pm.response.json();
function getPath(obj, path) { return path.split('.').reduce(function (current, key) { return current && current[key] !== undefined ? current[key] : undefined; }, obj); }

[["data.token"]].flat().some(function (path) { var value = getPath(json, path); if (value !== undefined && value !== null && value !== '') { pm.environment.set('admin_token', value); return true; } return false; });

[["data.user.id","data.user_id"]].flat().some(function (path) { var value = getPath(json, path); if (value !== undefined && value !== null && value !== '') { pm.environment.set('admin_user_id', value); return true; } return false; });

var json = pm.response.json();
function getPath(obj, path) { return path.split('.').reduce(function (current, key) { return current && current[key] !== undefined ? current[key] : undefined; }, obj); }

[["data.token"]].flat().some(function (path) { var value = getPath(json, path); if (value !== undefined && value !== null && value !== '') { pm.environment.set('employee_token', value); return true; } return false; });

[["data.user.id","data.user_id"]].flat().some(function (path) { var value = getPath(json, path); if (value !== undefined && value !== null && value !== '') { pm.environment.set('employee_user_id', value); return true; } return false; });
